doodle_burst.intro_subtitle: Let your brain wiggle for a minute.
doodle_burst.intro_reason: Sometimes your brain just needs to move.
doodle_burst.intro_benefit: Quick doodles can help release restlessness and reset your focus.
doodle_burst.prompt_2: Try filling the space with fun patterns. 🌀
doodle_burst.prompt_3: Slow down and draw a calm spiral. 🍥
doodle_burst.activity_instructions: Draw anything you want. Try circles, zigzags, spirals, dots, or silly shapes. There are no rules — just keep your hand moving.
doodle_burst.end_reset: Even a quick doodle can help your brain reset.
doodle_burst.checkin_calmer: Do you feel a little calmer?
doodle_burst.checkin_task: Ready to get back to your task?
doodle_burst.history_empty_desc: Complete a Doodle Burst session and your artwork will be saved here automatically.
doodle_burst.share_text:
I loved this doodle burst activity at TherapyMantra, you can try too just download the app to explore for yourself

Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.mantracare.therapy&hl=en_IN
iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/therapymantra/id1607643888
